title: loblawbob873-svg/posterchanai
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: ashlrai/ashlr-hub
summary: Local-first command center for agentic engineers — the CLI + Raycast hub and front door to the Ashlr dev-tool ecosystem.

title: DaveEuson/RigMatch.AI
summary: Speed Dating With Local AI Models

title: yuma-shintani/ollama-model-library
summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

title: chf3198/megingjord-harness
summary: AI agent governance harness: baton workflow, fleet LLM routing (Ollama/Claude/OpenRouter), and CI gates for Copilot, Claude Code, and Codex.

title: codemonkeying/lean-coder
summary: Lightweight terminal coding agent (~1.2k-token baseline) - drives a small local model or a frontier model with parallel workers

title: Martossien/transcria
summary: Self-hosted meeting transcription portal — speech-to-text, speaker diarization, LLM-corrected transcripts, structured summaries and Word minutes, on your own GPUs. Flask + PostgreSQL, GDPR audit trail, distributed GPU topologies, docker

title: Dev-Art-Solutions/InferHub
summary: Self-hosted LLM inference mesh in .NET. One Ollama-compatible API in front, a pool of GPU worker nodes behind it — run the hub where you have no GPU, run nodes where you do. Pluggable backends (Ollama first).

title: xuiltul/animaworks
summary: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Cursor/Ollama).

title: baiyuheniao/BaiyuAISpace2
summary: 轻量级跨平台 LLM 客户端 + AI Agent 开发环境 | Lightweight cross-platform LLM client & agent workspace (Tauri 2 + Vue 3 + Rust)

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli
summary: 🏆 Ultralight AI Coding Agent 2026 — Blazing CLI, Tiny Codebase, Full Power Free

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: majiayu000/litellm-rs
summary: A high-performance AI Gateway written in Rust — call 100+ LLM APIs using OpenAI format

title: r3dbars/nightshift
summary: Put your idle AI hardware to work while you sleep. Overnight, your machines scan the repo, draft safe work, and hand you a ranked morning brief. Drafts, not deploys. Local-first, MIT.

title: samestrin/llm-env
summary: Force any OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic API-compatible tool (Claude Code, Qwen Code, Aider, Fabric, Interpreter) to use Gemini, Groq, Cerebras, or Ollama. Pure Bash. Zero dependencies.

title: soenneker/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: LucidPrinciples/lucid-cove
summary: A private, self-hosted home for your family and its intelligence. Named agents with memory and daily practice — your data, your models, your machine.

title: daya7781r/miii-cli-offline-coder
summary: Miii-CLI 2026: Zero-Cost Local AI Coding Agent with Ollama – Fully Offline & Private

title: RedBeret/rag-eval-bench
